sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: FLLA ETF Analysis: Dividends, Returns AMEX:FLLA
feed.summary: This article provides an analysis of the Franklin FTSE Latin America ETF (FLLA), including its dividends, returns, and key features. FLLA invests in large and mid-cap Latin American stocks, aiming to replicate the FTSE Latin America RIC Capped Index. The piece details the fund's expense ratio, asset allocation, top holdings, and recent performance metrics.

feed.title: Sunset Strip Icon Reborn as The Valorian Los Angeles
feed.summary: The former Mondrian Los Angeles hotel on the iconic Sunset Strip has been rebranded as The Valorian Los Angeles, joining Hilton's Curio Collection. This transformation includes the introduction of the White Rabbit Sky Lounge, a reimagined rooftop destination. The rebranding signifies a new era for the well-known hotel, aiming to attract a new generation of travelers and locals to the legendary location.

feed.title: Booking Holdings Announces 25-for-1 Stock Split
feed.summary: Booking Holdings, the parent company of travel booking platforms, has announced a 25-for-1 forward stock split and increased its authorized common shares from 1 billion to 25 billion. This strategic move aims to make shares more accessible to a wider range of investors, potentially boosting trading volume and liquidity. Split-adjusted trading is expected to commence on April 6, 2026.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Mark Kidd Sells 6,000 Shares of Iron Mountain Inc (IRM)
feed.summary: Mark Kidd, EVP and General Manager of Data Centers & Asset Lifecycle Management at Iron Mountain Inc (IRM), sold 6,000 shares of the company on April 1, 2026. This transaction brings his total holdings to 125,507 shares. Over the past year, there has been one insider buy and 32 insider sells at Iron Mountain Inc, and the stock is considered fairly valued based on its GuruFocus Value.

feed.title: Insider Sell: William Mosley Sells 20,000 Shares of Seagate Tech
feed.summary: William Mosley, CEO of Seagate Technology Holdings PLC, sold 20,000 shares on April 1, 2026, reducing his total holdings to 355,591 shares. The company's stock is trading at $420.73, and its price-earnings ratio of 48.57 is significantly higher than the industry median and its historical median, indicating the stock is overvalued according to GuruFocus's intrinsic value estimate.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Ralph Larossa Sells Shares of Public Service Enter
feed.summary: Ralph Larossa, Chair, President, and CEO of Public Service Electric and Gas Company, a subsidiary of Public Service Enterprise Group Inc (PEG), sold 2,083 shares of the company on April 1, 2026. This transaction increased his total holdings to 291,397.9713 shares. Over the past year, Larossa has sold 8,309 shares and made no purchases, contributing to a trend of eight insider sells and no buys for the company during the same period.

feed.title: Starbucks Finalizes Deal with Boyu Capital for China Operations
feed.summary: Starbucks has finalized a deal with Boyu Capital, giving Boyu-managed funds a 60% stake in Starbucks China's retail operations, while Starbucks retains 40%. This transition to a licensed operating model aims to significantly expand Starbucks' presence in China from 8,000 to 20,000 stores, with the China retail business projected to be valued at over $13 billion. The strategic partnership is intended to enhance market coverage, customer experience, and local relevance for Starbucks in the Chinese market.

feed.title: PACCAR (PCAR) director adjusts RSDCP phantom stock and unit balances
feed.summary: PACCAR director Luiz Antonio Dos Santos reported an administrative adjustment to his equity compensation, involving 180.6205 stock units at $117.65 per unit. This update increased his direct stock unit balance to 1,546.4859 units and noted his holding of 4,229.2487 phantom stock units in the Restricted Stock and Deferred Compensation Plan (RSDCP), which are convertible to PACCAR common shares. This transaction was not an open-market trade but an administrative change to his deferred compensation.

feed.title: PACCAR (PCAR) director adjusts deferred stock units and large share stake
feed.summary: PACCAR director John Pigott reported routine changes in his deferred stock unit holdings via a Form 4 filing. The transaction involved 297.4926 stock units valued at $117.65 each, bringing his total balance to 3,373.3605 units, tied to the company's Restricted Stock and Deferred Compensation Plan for non-employee directors. Pigott also updated his substantial direct and indirect holdings of PACCAR common shares, totaling over 3.4 million shares.

feed.title: Walmart (WMT) director Steuart Walton granted 282 deferred stock units
feed.summary: Walmart Inc. director Steuart L. Walton was granted 282 deferred stock units as quarterly director compensation, valued at $124.28 per share. This transaction increases his direct holdings to 80,053.574 common shares, with an additional 93,654 shares indirectly owned by his spouse. The award was not an open market purchase but a deferral of compensation.

feed.title: PMGC Holdings Launches New Defense Tech Subsidiary
feed.summary: PMGC Holdings Inc. has launched NorthStrive Defense Tech LLC, a new wholly-owned subsidiary focusing on advanced defense technologies, including drones and autonomous systems. This move aims to capitalize on the transforming defense sector by leveraging PMGC's existing infrastructure and subsidiaries, AGA Precision Systems LLC and Silicon Valley Machining, Inc., to commercialize innovative defense solutions. The company expects to make further announcements regarding NorthStrive Defense Tech's progress soon.

feed.title: Processa Pharma chief business officer Lin buys $4063 in PCSA By Investing.com
feed.summary: Processa Pharmaceuticals' Chief Business - Strategy Officer, Patrick Lin, purchased 1,603 shares of company stock for $4,063 at a price of $2.535 per share. This transaction increases Lin's direct holdings to 3,356 shares and indirect holdings to 1,740 shares through a family trust. The company also recently completed enrollment for a Phase 2 clinical study of NGC-Cap for advanced breast cancer.

feed.title: Tesla employment in Austin fell 22% in 2025 amid sales slump
feed.summary: Tesla's Gigafactory Texas experienced a significant 22% decrease in employment in 2025, falling to 16,506 employees in the Austin area amid a company-wide sales slump. Despite the reduction in workforce, Tesla reported substantial investments in its Austin complex, exceeding $6.3 billion, and an increase in average hourly wages for its employees. The company also announced plans for a new chip manufacturing plant and a riverfront land restoration project in Austin for 2026.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Bumps Saperstein’s Pay to $34 Million for 2025
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has increased the pay for Co-President Andy Saperstein to $34 million for 2025, a 26% rise from the previous year. This places him among the highest-paid wealth executives, on par with fellow Co-President Daniel A. Simkowitz, and follows a recent 32% pay increase for CEO Edward "Ted" Pick. The compensation committee cited Saperstein's contributions to record wealth management results and the firm's AI strategy.

feed.title: Expedia Group (NASDAQ: EXPE) director gets 48.7 deferred stock units as fees
feed.summary: Expedia Group director Henrique Dubugras received 48.725 deferred stock units as compensation for the quarter ending March 31, 2026, in lieu of cash fees. These units are convertible to common stock on a 1-for-1 basis and will be settled in shares after his directorship ends, with the transaction documented in a recent Form 4 filing. This grant is part of the company's Non-Employee Director Deferred Compensation Plan and does not involve open-market trading.

feed.title: Todd Vasos receives 2,306 deferred KeyCorp (NYSE: KEY) shares
feed.summary: KeyCorp director Todd J. Vasos was granted 2,306 deferred shares on March 31, 2026, as part of the company's Directors' Deferred Share Plan. These shares, which are the economic equivalent of common shares, arise from Vasos electing to defer his directors' fees. Payment of these deferred shares is postponed until July 1, 2028, or his death, and after this grant, Vasos holds a total of 68,098 deferred shares and 35,255 common shares directly.

feed.title: Devina Rankin of KeyCorp (NYSE: KEY) adds 1,558 deferred shares in equity grant
feed.summary: Devina A. Rankin, a director at KeyCorp (NYSE: KEY), has received a grant of 1,558 deferred shares as part of her director fees. These shares, valued at $20.05 each, are economically equivalent to common shares but will not be paid out until January 1, 2029, or her death. Following this transaction, she holds 81,765 deferred shares and 13,430 common shares, aligning her long-term compensation with the company's performance.

feed.title: KeyCorp (NYSE: KEY) director receives 841 deferred shares in fee plan
feed.summary: KeyCorp director Alexander M. Cutler was granted 841 deferred shares on March 31, 2026, as part of the company's Deferred Share Plan. These shares are economically equivalent to common shares, with a reference price of $20.05 per share. Payment of these deferred shares is scheduled for July 1, 2027, or earlier upon the participant's death, and Cutler now holds a total of 57,822 deferred shares and 298,416 common shares.

feed.title: Bristol Myers Squibb EVP Sells $1.85M in Shares
feed.summary: David Elkins, Executive Vice President at Bristol Myers Squibb Company (NYSE:BMY), sold 30,000 shares of the company's stock for $1.85 million, reducing his ownership by 15.85%. Despite the significant sale, Elkins still retains a substantial stake valued at approximately $9.8 million. While insider sales can sometimes affect investor sentiment, this transaction is not necessarily indicative of broader concerns for the company, which continues to advance its drug pipeline.

feed.title: Director Parker receives 883 RSUs in Synchrony Financial (NYSE: SYF)
feed.summary: Synchrony Financial director P.W. Parker was granted 883 restricted stock units (RSUs) valued at $68.02 per share, which will fully vest on March 31, 2027. This equity award is a form of compensation and not an open-market purchase. Following this grant, Parker directly holds 33,672 shares of Synchrony Financial common stock.

feed.title: Duos Technologies Group (NASDAQ:DUOT) Announces Quarterly Earnings Results
feed.summary: Duos Technologies Group (NASDAQ:DUOT) reported a wider-than-expected EPS loss of ($0.15), missing the consensus of ($0.01), despite revenue of $9.46 million surpassing expectations. The company plans to divest its rail division within 60 days to concentrate on a data-center-first strategy. This pivot includes a $10 million backlog for its new Duos Technology Solutions, deployment of 15 Edge AI data centers, and secured contracts worth $176 million over 36 months for GPU-as-a-Service, though significant execution risks and reliance on large, NDA-covered customers remain.

feed.title: FibroBiologics Closes $3M Public Offering
feed.summary: FibroBiologics, a Houston-based biotech company specializing in regenerative medicine, has successfully closed a $3 million public offering. The capital raised will be used to advance its pipeline of therapies, which are based on its proprietary fibroblast technology. This successful offering highlights investor confidence in the company's technology and its potential to address unmet needs in regenerative medicine.

feed.title: First Guaranty Bancshares Director Purchases $250K in Stock
feed.summary: A director of First Guaranty Bancshares, Bruce Mcanally, purchased 32,176 shares of the company's stock for over $250,000, increasing his stake by 10.71%. This insider transaction signals confidence in the regional bank's future prospects and suggests that Mcanally views the company as undervalued with growth potential. The purchase details were disclosed in an SEC filing and indicate a positive outlook for the financial holding company.

feed.title: FBRT Stockholders Have Rights - If You Lost Money Investing in Franklin BSP Realty Trust, Inc. Contact Robbins LLP for Information About Recovering Your Losses
feed.summary: Robbins LLP has filed a class action lawsuit on behalf of investors who purchased Franklin BSP Realty Trust, Inc. (FBRT) securities between November 5, 2024, and February 11, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that FBRT misled investors about its ability to maintain its $0.355 dividend, leading to a significant drop in stock price after the company announced a dividend cut to $0.20 on February 12, 2026. Shareholders have until April 27, 2026, to submit their papers with the court to serve as lead plaintiff.

feed.title: DeFi Development Corp. to Host X Spaces Event: “DFDV March 2026 Recap & AMA + FY 2025 Earnings Breakdown”
feed.summary: DeFi Development Corp. (Nasdaq: DFDV) announced it will host a live X Spaces event on Monday, April 6, 2026, at 1:00 PM ET. The event will cover a recap of DFDV's March 2026 progress and discuss their latest 2026 investor letter, allowing shareholders and analysts to engage with the company. DFDV's treasury strategy focuses on accumulating and compounding Solana (SOL), offering investors direct economic exposure to SOL and actively participating in the Solana ecosystem's growth.

feed.title: DeFi Development sets April 6 live X Spaces on March recap
feed.summary: DeFi Development Corp. (Nasdaq: DFDV) will host a live X Spaces event on April 6, 2026, at 1:00 PM ET to recap March 2026 activities and discuss the company's latest investor letter. The event aims to provide updates to shareholders, analysts, and the community without disclosing material nonpublic information. A recording will be made available after the live session.

feed.title: Cheetah Net Establishes $100 Million ATM Equity Program
feed.summary: Cheetah Net Supply Chain Service, Inc. (CTNT) has established a $100 million at-the-market (ATM) equity program with AC Sunshine Securities LLC. This program allows the company to flexibly raise capital by offering Class A common stock without a fixed-size issuance, paying a 3% commission on gross proceeds. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates CTNT as Neutral due to weak financial performance, despite improved deleveraging and cash flow.

feed.title: Do Definium Therapeutics’ (DFTX) New Hires Hint At A Deeper Bet On Anxiety Treatments?
feed.summary: Definium Therapeutics recently granted stock options to new employees and published a study highlighting the high prevalence of generalized anxiety disorder (GAD) in U.S. adults. This reinforces the focus on DT120 ODT, their lead anxiety treatment candidate, targeting a significant unmet medical need. The article discusses Definium's investment narrative, financial forecasts, and the potential impact of their Phase III readouts in 2026, while also considering risks and alternative analyst perspectives.

feed.title: Encore Capital Group to Release Q1 2026 Financial Results on May 6
feed.summary: Encore Capital Group announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on May 6. The company specializes in consumer debt management and recovery solutions. Investors and stakeholders will analyze the report for insights into its financial performance, including revenue, expenses, and key operational metrics, to assess its market position and future trajectory.

feed.title: Northern Trust (NTRS) director adds stock units and reports trust holdings
feed.summary: Northern Trust Corp director Charles A. Tribbett received 86.31 stock units of common stock worth $141.41 per share on April 1, 2026. This award increases his direct holdings to 36,711.58 shares, with an additional 2,822 shares held indirectly through a trust. The stock units are convertible to common shares on a 1-for-1 basis.

feed.title: PMGC Holdings Inc. Launches NorthStrive Defense Tech to Focus on Drone and Autonomous Systems Market
feed.summary: PMGC Holdings Inc. has unveiled its new subsidiary, NorthStrive Defense Tech, to strategically enter the drone and autonomous systems market within the defense sector. This initiative aims to address the growing demand for advanced solutions in these high-growth areas. While specific operational details were not released, the company emphasizes its commitment to leveraging emerging technologies for specialized market needs.

feed.title: [Form 4] NORTHERN TRUST CORP Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Northern Trust Corp director Donald Thompson reported receiving stock-based awards rather than making open-market purchases. He acquired 268.68 shares on March 31, 2026, and an additional 142.85 shares on April 1, 2026, as grant or award transactions. Following these awards, Thompson directly held 30,312.85 shares, with an additional 1,743 shares held indirectly by a trust, all representing compensation-related equity units.

feed.title: Northern Trust (NTRS) director Susan Crown receives grant of stock units
feed.summary: Northern Trust Corp director Susan Crown received a grant of 82.65 Common Stock Units on April 1, 2026, as a compensation award, valued at $141.41 per unit. These units are payable in Northern Trust common shares when her service as a director ends. Following this transaction, she directly holds 37,660.25 Common Stock Units and 18,400 common shares, with additional shares held indirectly through trusts and an LLC.

feed.title: Dollar Tree (NASDAQ: DLTR) CPO gets RSU shares, shares withheld for taxes
feed.summary: Dollar Tree's Chief People Officer, Steven Schumacher, acquired 221 shares from performance-based RSUs which vested on March 31, 2026. Simultaneously, 323 shares were withheld at a value of $109.51 per share to cover tax liabilities arising from the RSU vesting. Following these transactions, Schumacher directly holds 17,542 shares of Dollar Tree.

feed.title: QUALCOMM (QCOM) CAO family trust sells 85 shares under Rule 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Patricia Y. Grech, SVP and Chief Accounting Officer of QUALCOMM (QCOM), reported an open-market sale of 85 shares of common stock at $125.50 per share through her family trust. This transaction was executed under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on December 11, 2025. After the sale, the trust indirectly holds 192 shares for the benefit of her immediate family.

feed.title: Excelerate Energy (NYSE: EE) officer has RSU shares withheld for taxes
feed.summary: Excelerate Energy (NYSE: EE) officer Amy Thompson Broussard had 699 shares of Class A common stock withheld at $33.31 per share to cover tax liabilities from vested restricted stock units (RSUs). This was a routine, non-market transaction related to equity compensation under the company's Long-Term Incentive Plan. After this withholding, she directly holds 32,152 shares of Class A common stock.

feed.title: Excelerate Energy (EE) officer has RSUs withheld for taxes
feed.summary: Excelerate Energy (EE) officer Michael Anthony Bent had 576 shares of Class A Common Stock, valued at $33.31 per share, withheld to cover tax obligations related to restricted stock units (RSUs) that vested on March 31, 2026. These RSUs were part of a grant issued on March 31, 2023, under the company's Long-Term Incentive Plan. Following this transaction, Bent directly holds 31,332 shares of Class A Common Stock.

feed.title: Halliburton Acquires Sekal AS to Enhance Drilling Automation - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Halliburton has acquired Sekal AS from Sumitomo Corporation to enhance its drilling automation capabilities. This integration combines Halliburton's LOGIX systems with Sekal's DrillTronics platform, aiming to create advanced digital solutions for well placement, real-time optimization, and automated rig operations. The acquisition is expected to reduce well construction costs, increase recovery rates, and lower operational risks for clients globally.

feed.title: [ARS] VERTEX PHARMACEUTICALS INC / MA SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article reports on an ARS SEC filing by VERTEX PHARMACEUTICALS INC / MA (VRTX) on April 2, 2026, at 04:06 PM. The filing is categorized with a low impact and neutral sentiment. It provides key company data such as market cap, float, industry, country, and city, along with recent news and other SEC filings from Vertex Pharmaceuticals.

feed.title: Jabil (NYSE: JBL) SVP sells 1,000 shares, retains 17,920
feed.summary: Jabil Inc.'s Senior Vice President, Adam E. Berry, sold 1,000 shares of common stock at an average price of $272.7965 per share in an open-market transaction. Following this sale, Berry directly retains 17,920 shares of Jabil common stock. This transaction was disclosed on a Form 4 and is categorized as a moderate impact with negative sentiment according to the filing summary.

feed.title: Quest Diagnostics (DGX) director defers pay into 198 phantom stock units
feed.summary: Timothy C. Wentworth, a director at Quest Diagnostics (DGX), has deferred his cash compensation and received 198 phantom stock units. These units, which derive from the company's Deferred Compensation Plan for Directors, will be paid out in cash when his service as a director concludes. This transaction, categorized as a grant/award acquisition, is part of his compensation rather than a direct stock purchase.

feed.title: Abbott (ABT) director Gonzalez receives 321 stock equivalent units as fees
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories director Patricia Paola Gonzalez received a grant of 321 Stock Equivalent Units as part of her director compensation. These units, valued at $102.67 each, track Abbott's common shares and are held in a grantor trust, increasing her total to 5,558 units. The units will be paid in cash upon her retirement or at age 65 and include amounts from a dividend reinvestment feature.

feed.title: Elong Power (NASDAQ: ELPW) shifts to Nasdaq Capital Market after value shortfalls
feed.summary: Elong Power (ELPW) has transferred its Class A ordinary shares from the Nasdaq Global Market to the Nasdaq Capital Market, effective April 1, 2026. This strategic move was made after the company received notices that its Market Value of Listed Securities had fallen below the $50 million minimum and its Market Value of Publicly Held Shares below the $15 million minimum required for the Global Market. Following the transfer, Nasdaq confirmed that Elong Power had regained compliance with the relevant Listing Rules applicable to the Capital Market, closing the deficiency matters.

feed.title: Edwards Lifesciences (EW) VP sells 22,680 shares after option exercise
feed.summary: Edwards Lifesciences' CVP, Strategy and Corporate Development, Donald E. Bobo Jr., exercised options for 22,680 shares at $59.2567 and subsequently sold all 22,680 shares in open-market transactions with weighted average prices of $80.5915 and $80.0494. These transactions were conducted under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on February 27, 2025. After these sales, Bobo Jr. holds 21,266.2532 direct shares, along with additional indirect holdings in a 401(k) and a trust.

feed.title: Iron Mountain (NYSE:IRM) CEO William Meaney Sells 38,474 Shares
feed.summary: Iron Mountain CEO William Meaney sold 38,474 shares of the company stock on April 1st for approximately $3.95 million, reducing his stake by 50% under a pre-arranged trading plan. The company recently declared a quarterly dividend of $0.864, resulting in an annualized dividend of $3.46 and a 3.3% yield. Despite a high dividend payout ratio of 718.75%, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus with an average target price of $116.60 for IRM.

feed.title: Iron Mountain (NYSE:IRM) EVP Sells $616,260.00 in Stock
feed.summary: Iron Mountain EVP Mark Kidd sold 6,000 shares of NYSE:IRM stock for $616,260 on April 1st, reducing his holding to 125,507 shares. The transaction was made under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Iron Mountain also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.864, offering a ~3.3% yield, though its dividend payout ratio is notably high at 718.75%.

feed.title: Dollar Tree (DLTR) CIO RSUs vest; shares surrendered to cover taxes
feed.summary: Dollar Tree's Chief Information Officer, Robert Aflatooni, reported a routine equity compensation activity where 1,261 shares of common stock from performance-based RSUs vested on March 31, 2026. To cover tax liabilities, 1,097 shares valued at $109.51 per share were surrendered. This transaction resulted in a net increase of 164 shares, bringing his direct holdings to 21,391 shares.

feed.title: Electra Battery (ELBM) sets June 23, 2026 shareholder meeting date
feed.summary: Electra Battery Materials Corporation (ELBM) has scheduled its Annual and Special Meeting of security holders for June 23, 2026. The record date for both receiving notice and voting is April 30, 2026, for holders of common shares. The company will utilize a Notice-and-Access model for distributing proxy materials to both registered shareholders and beneficial owners.

feed.title: Encore Capital Group to Announce Q1 2026 Earnings on May 6
feed.summary: Encore Capital Group, an international specialty finance company, will release its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on Wednesday, May 6, 2026, after the market closes. The company will also host a conference call and slide presentation the same day at 2:00 p.m. Pacific / 5:00 p.m. Eastern time to discuss the reported results, providing insights into the international specialty finance industry's performance.

feed.title: United Airlines (NASDAQ: UAL) director defers 2026 fees into 432 share units
feed.summary: United Airlines director Matthew Friend deferred his 2026 quarterly retainer fees into 432.77 share units, granted on March 31, 2026, under the company's Director Equity Incentive Plan. These share units, which convert to common stock on a 1-for-1 basis, will be settled after his separation from service. Following this transaction, Friend directly holds 11,085.53 share units, aligning his compensation with the company's equity performance.
